close_reason: Extracted secret_value_from_response() that rejects empty values
description: src/lib.rs:302 does Ok(SecretValue::new(secret_resp.value.into_bytes())) with no check. If Bitwarden ever returns a SecretResponse with an empty 'value' string (intentionally empty secret, or an SDK bug returning Some("") instead of None for a deleted secret), the caller gets an empty SecretValue. There is precedent in this workspace for this being a real gap: see crate-secretsx-bdu0.3 which calls out the same class of bug for azure-kv ('secret.value == None mapped to NotFound; should be DecodeFailed/Backend'). Investigate whether Bitwarden Secrets Manager allows zero-length secret values — if not, return SecretError::DecodeFailed("empty secret value from backend") on empty. If yes, current behavior is correct and this can be closed with a no-op. If the answer requires live testing, file as needs-integration-test.
title: Empty SecretResponse.value mapped to empty SecretValue (no validation)
